name: Cambodia Agricultural Cooperative Alliance (CAC Alliance)
description: CAC Alliance was created to better manage and serve the agriculture cooperatives in Cambodia. It is a non-profit corporation with certain regulatory requirements delegated by the government. Their members are cooperatives formed by local communities and their farms to better manage and distribute their crop production. Their first 5-year strategic plan includes: institutional capacity, financial viability, member services, value chain development and enabling environment.

name: Habitat for Humanity Cambodia
description: Habitat for Humanity country or regional office. Sweat-equity homeownership program. See https://www.habitatcambodia.org/.
